sections.label: Section 5.2.770
sections.original: Ut sit qui vivat dum aliud aliquid flagiti conficiat .
sections.translation: that he may have something on which to subsist while he plans some other piece of roguery ?

sections.label: Section 5.2.771
sections.translation: Most clearly so .

sections.label: Section 5.2.771b
sections.original: His nunc praemium est qui recta prava faciunt .
sections.translation: They now get rewarded for it , who confound right with wrong .

sections.label: Section 5.2.772
sections.translation: Most undoubtedly .

sections.label: Section 5.2.772b
sections.original: Ut stultissime quidem illi rem gesserimus .
sections.translation: How very foolishly , in fact , we have managed the affair with him !

sections.label: Section 5.2.773
sections.original: Modo ut hoc consilio possiet discedi ut istam ducat .
sections.translation: If by these means we can only manage for him to marry her .

sections.label: Section 5.2.774
sections.translation: Is that , then , a matter of doubt ?

sections.label: Section 5.2.774b
sections.original: Haud scio hercle , ut homo est , an mutet animum .
sections.translation: I ’ faith , judging from what the fellow is , I don ’ t know whether he mightn ’ t change his mind .

sections.label: Section 5.2.775
sections.translation: How ! change it indeed ?

sections.label: Section 5.2.775b
sections.translation: I don ’ t know : but if perhaps , I say .

sections.label: Section 5.2.776
sections.original: Ita faciam , ut frater censuit , ut uxorem huc eius adducam ,
sections.translation: I ’ ll do as my brother advised me , bring hither his wife , to talk with her . Do you , Geta , go before ; tell her that Nausistrata is about to visit her . ( DEMIPHO goes into the house of CHREMES .)

sections.label: Section 5.2.778
sections.original: Argentum inventum est Phaedriae : de iurgio siletur .
sections.translation: The money ’ s been got for Phaedria ; it ’ s all hushed about the lawsuit ; due care has been taken that she ’ s not to leave for the present . What next , then ?

sections.label: Section 5.2.780
sections.original: Quid fict ? in eodem luto haesitas : versura solves ,
sections.translation: What ’ s to be done ? You are still sticking in the mud . You are paying by borrowing ; [*] the evil that was at hand , has been put off for a day . The toils are increasing upon you , if you don ’ t look out . Now I ’ ll away home , and tell Phanium not to be afraid of Nausistrata , or his talking . [*]

sections.label: Section 5.3.784
sections.original: Agedum , ut soles , Nausistrata , fac illa ut placetur nobis ;
sections.translation: Come now , Nausistrata , after your usual way , manage to keep her in good-humor with us ,

sections.label: Section 5.3.785
sections.original: Ut sua voluntate id quod est faciendum faciat .
sections.translation: and make her do of her own accord what must be done .

sections.label: Section 5.3.785b
sections.translation: I will .

sections.label: Section 5.3.786
sections.original: Pariter nunc opera me adiuvas ac re dudum opitulata es .
sections.translation: You are now seconding me with your endeavors , just as you assisted me with your money [*] before .

sections.label: Section 5.3.787
sections.original: Factum volo ; at pol minus queo viri culpa quam me dignum est .
sections.translation: I wish to do so ; and yet , i ’ faith , through the fault of my husband , I am less able than I ought to be .

sections.label: Section 5.3.788
sections.translation: Why so ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.788b
sections.original: Quia pol mei patris bene parta indiligenter
sections.translation: Because , i ’ faith , he takes such indifferent care of the property that was so industriously acquired by my father ; for from those farms he used regularly to receive two talents of silver yearly ; there ’ s an instance , how superior one man is to another .

sections.label: Section 5.3.790b
sections.translation: Two talents , pray ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.791
sections.original: Ac rebus vilioribus multo , tamen talenta bina .
sections.translation: Aye , and when things were much worse , two talents even .

sections.label: Section 5.3.791b
sections.translation: Whew !

sections.label: Section 5.3.792
sections.translation: What ! does this seem surprising ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.792b
sections.translation: Of course it does .

sections.label: Section 5.3.792c
sections.translation: I wish I had been born a man ; I ’ d have shown —

sections.label: Section 5.3.793b
sections.translation: That I ’ m quite sure of .

sections.label: Section 5.3.793c
sections.translation: In what way —

sections.label: Section 5.3.793d
sections.translation: Forbear , pray , that you may be able to do battle with her ; lest she , being a young woman , may be more than a match for you .

sections.label: Section 5.3.795
sections.original: Faciam ut iubes : sed meum virum abs te exire video .
sections.translation: I ’ ll do as you bid me ; but I see my husband coming out of your house . ( Enter CHREMES , hastily , from DEMIPHO ’ S house .)

sections.label: Section 5.3.795b
sections.translation: Ha ! Demipho , has the money been paid him yet ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.796b
sections.translation: I took care immediately .

sections.label: Section 5.3.796c
sections.translation: I wish it hadn ’ t been paid him . ( On seeing NAUSISTRATA , aside .) : Halloo , I espy my wife ; I had almost said more than I ought .

sections.label: Section 5.3.797b
sections.translation: Why do you wish I hadn ’ t , Chremes ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.798
sections.translation: It ’ s all right .

sections.label: Section 5.3.798b
sections.original: Quid tu ? ecquid locutus cum ista es quamobrem hanc ducimus ?
sections.translation: What say you ? Have you been letting her know why we are going to bring her ? ( pointing to NAUSISTRATA .)

sections.label: Section 5.3.799
sections.translation: I ’ ve arranged it .

sections.label: Section 5.3.799b
sections.translation: Pray , what does she say ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.799c
sections.translation: She can ’ t be got to leave .

sections.label: Section 5.3.799d
sections.translation: Why can ’ t she ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.800
sections.translation: Because they are fond of one another .

sections.label: Section 5.3.800b
sections.translation: What ’ s that to us ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.800c
sections.translation: A great deal ; besides that , I ’ ve found out that she is related to us .

sections.label: Section 5.3.801b
sections.translation: What ! You are mad , surely .

sections.label: Section 5.3.801c
sections.translation: So you will find ; I don ’ t speak at random ; I ’ ve recovered my recollection .

sections.label: Section 5.3.802b
sections.translation: Are you quite in your senses ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.803
sections.original: Au , obsecro , cave ne in cognatam pecces .
sections.translation: Nay , prithee , do take care not to injure your kinswoman .

sections.label: Section 5.3.803b
sections.translation: She is not .

sections.label: Section 5.3.803c
sections.translation: Don ’ t deny it ; her father went by another name ; that was the cause of your mistake .

sections.label: Section 5.3.804b
sections.translation: Did she not know who was her father ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.805
sections.translation: She did .

sections.label: Section 5.3.805b
sections.translation: Why did she call him by another name ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.805c
sections.translation: Will you never yield to me , nor understand what I mean ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.806b
sections.translation: If you don ’ t tell me of any thing —

sections.label: Section 5.3.806c
sections.translation: Do you persist ?

sections.label: Section 5.3.806d
sections.translation: I wonder what all this can be .

sections.label: Section 5.3.807
sections.translation: For my part , upon my faith , I don ’ t know .

sections.label: Section 5.3.807b
sections.original: Vin scire ? At ita me servet Iupiter
sections.translation: Would you like to know ? Then , so may Jupiter preserve me , not a person is there more nearly related to her than are you and I .

sections.label: Section 5.3.808b
sections.translation: Ye Gods , by our trust in you ! let ’ s away to her ; I wish for all of us , one way or other , to be sure about this ( going ) .

sections.label: Section 5.3.809b
sections.translation: Ah !
